attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT CG1_CP_CUST_DATA.CATEGORY_ID, CG1_CP_CUST_DATA.CATEGORY_NAME, CG1_CP_CUST_DATA.CUST_DATA_ID, CG1_CP_CUST_DATA.ATTRIBUTE1, CG1_CP_CUST_DATA.ATTRIBUTE2, CG1_CP_CUST_DATA.ATTRIBUTE3, CG1_CP_CUST_DATA.ATTRIBUTE4, CG1_CP_CUST_DATA.ATTRIBUTE5, CG1_CP_CUST_DATA.ATTRIBUTE6, CG1_CP_CUST_DATA.ATTRIBUTE7, CG1_CP_CUST_DATA.ATTRIBUTE8, CG1_CP_CUST_DATA.ATTRIBUTE9, CG1_CP_CUST_DATA.ATTRIBUTE10, CG1_CP_CUST_DATA.ATTRIBUTE11, CG1_CP_CUST_DATA.ATTRIBUTE12, CG1_CP_CUST_DATA.ATTRIBUTE13, CG1_CP_CUST_DATA.ATTRIBUTE14, CG1_CP_CUST_DATA.ATTRIBUTE15, CG1_CP_CUST_DATA.ATTRIBUTE16, CG1_CP_CUST_DATA.ATTRIBUTE17, CG1_CP_CUST_DATA.ATTRIBUTE18, CG1_CP_CUST_DATA.ATTRIBUTE19, CG1_CP_CUST_DATA.ATTRIBUTE20, CG1_CP_CUST_DATA.ATTRIBUTE21, CG1_CP_CUST_DATA.ATTRIBUTE22, CG1_CP_CUST_DATA.ATTRIBUTE23, CG1_CP_CUST_DATA.ATTRIBUTE24, CG1_CP_CUST_DATA.ATTRIBUTE25, CG1_CP_CUST_DATA.ATTRIBUTE26, CG1_CP_CUST_DATA.ATTRIBUTE27, CG1_CP_CUST_DATA.ATTRIBUTE28, CG1_CP_CUST_DATA.ATTRIBUTE29, CG1_CP_CUST_DATA.ATTRIBUTE30, CG1_CP_CUST_DATA.WEIGHTING_TOTAL, CG1_CP_CUST_DATA.EFFECTIVE_FROM_DATE, CG1_CP_CUST_DATA.EFFECTIVE_TO_DATE, CG1_CP_CUST_DATA.CREATED_BY, CG1_CP_CUST_DATA.CREATION_DATE, CG1_CP_CUST_DATA.LAST_UPDATED_BY, CG1_CP_CUST_DATA.LAST_UPDATE_DATE, CG1_CP_CUST_DATA.LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN, CG1_CP_CUST_DATA.MD_ID, CG1_CP_CUST_DATA.SOURCE_ID, CG1_CP_CUST_DATA.PARENT_CUST_DATA_ID, CG1_CP_CUST_DATA.SOURCE_DML_TYPE, CG1_CP_CUST_DATA.SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME, CG1_CP_CUST_DATA.REFRESH_DATETIME 
FROM
$$NRTACCUMVWDB.CG1_CP_CUST_DATA
WHERE   SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME > '$$LastExtractDate' 
QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY CG1_CP_CUST_DATA.CUST_DATA_ID ORDER BY   REFRESH_DATETIME DESC) = 1
